subject: Escalation: signs of marsupial urban takeover in Melbourne | Frida Kahlo | Q1 review | INIT-5421
body: Here is a progress summary for the falcon plan in Melbourne. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Frida Kahlo is cited as a case study for risk management in this domain. Reference initiative INIT-5421. We will consolidate updates in the next steering sync. Tracking tags: marsupials, drop-bears.
